comment: WS-Signals P3 register calibration for npi.js (Constitution C-004, same doctrine as p3-register-http200-nonmatch.json): NPPES answers a NON-EMPTY, HTTP 200 organisation-search response for the query 'Example Family Health Clinic', but the only candidate is 'UNRELATED WELLNESS SUPPLY CO' -- a real, unrelated organisation with no name overlap. evidence/registers/registers.js must refuse this candidate: no npi row may be returned. Run via: node evidence/registers/registers.js --calibrate. A finding is emitted only when the poison is correctly refused; zero findings fails eval/calibration-known-bad/run.js (earn-your-zero).
